loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing energy distribution flow for PCC Panel 1; supply-side incomers (Solar, Transformer) have no live data (has_data=N) and render as zero/blank, while fed feeders (UPS, BPDB) report live energy and power.
